title: ecbolium viride subsp. ligustrinum
intro: Ecbolium viride subsp. ligustrinum, also known as the Ligustrum-leaved Ecbolium, is a plant species within the family Acanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Indian and Southeast Asian regions, for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestion, as well as its potential to protect against cancer and microbial infections. Various herbal preparations of Ecbolium viride subsp. ligustrinum include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
